Dine In & Delivery

A Taste of Thailand

From fragrant curries to fresh vegan bowls — every dish is made with intention and heart.

Thai Curries
Pad Thai
Tom Kha Soup
Fresh Thai Salads
Chicken Satay

Bangkok Flavor,
Henderson Heart

กรุงเทพ — Krung Thep — is the Thai name for Bangkok, the City of Angels. We carry that spirit to every table: vibrant, generous, and alive with flavor.

Our menu celebrates the full breadth of Thai cuisine — from fiery Larb and silky Tom Kha, to crispy satay and fragrant jasmine rice. And for our vegan guests, every dish has a plant-based counterpart made with the same love and tradition.

Located in Henderson, Nevada, we are proud to bring an authentic taste of Thailand to the Las Vegas valley.

Authentic Thai Full Vegan Menu Craft Cocktails Henderson, NV Dine In & Delivery

House Favorites

Chef's Specialties
& Seafood

Spice Captain's Salmon*

$25.95

Slowly grilled fresh salmon with asparagus, topped with spicy garlic sauce and fried basil.

Asparagus Shrimp & Scallops

$32.95

Sautéed asparagus, shrimp, and scallops with shiitake mushrooms and carrots in black sweet oyster sauce.

Lemon Fish

$27.95

Steamed sea bass in garlic lime juice. Served on cabbage with lime juice broth.

Green Curry Noodles

$22.95

Rice noodle sautéed with green curry with chicken, shrimp, and mussels.

Tiger Tear*

$33.95

Marinated rib-eye steak with authentic Thai chili-lime sauce.

Bangkok Street Noodles

$22.95

Stir-fried chili paste & house sauce with egg noodles, shrimp & chicken, carrots, celery, cashews, onions.

Bravo Favorite!

PanRoasts (Shrimp, Crab & Chicken)

$33.95

Creamy tomato stew cooked with your choice of seafood or meat. Served with steamed rice.

Grilled Rack of Lamb*

$32.95

Sautéed vegetables with garlic brown sauce. Served with steamed rice.

Chowder Fries

$16.95

Creamy chowder served with french fries.

Clam Chowder

$22.95

Creamy chowder from clams, potato, onion, celery. Served in a bread bowl.
